name: Little Splash
short_description: Little Splash is a 2D precision platformer inspired by the classics you love. Here you play as an agile protagonist who will splash paint all over your path, are you ready to make the cleanest run possible?
detailed_description:
Your mission is to complete the levels in as few attempts as possible. As you progress, more traps and objects are introduced, consequently the challenges become more complicated.

Main features:


  • Challenging levels with different color palettes.
  • Traps like saws, spikes, and collapsing platforms.
  • Helpful objects such as fans, jump pads, and treadmills.

And other secrets you need to play to discover them!

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Dutch, Japanese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Swedish, Traditional Chinese, Turkish, Ukrainian
